name: Frozen Chocolate Bananas
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chopped peanuts in a shallow bowl.
2. Line a plate with waxed paper.
3. Put the chocolate pieces into a skillet.
4. Place the skillet on the burner and use adult help to turn the heat to low.
5. Stir constantly until the chocolate melts, then turn off the burner.
6. Remove the skillet from the heat.
7. Peel the bananas and discard the peels.
8. Cut each banana in half on a cutting board using a table knife.
9. Insert a wooden stick into the cut end of each banana half.
10. Use a table knife to spread chocolate evenly over all sides of the banana halves.
11. Roll each banana half in peanuts until fully coated.
12. Place the bananas on the waxed paper-lined plate.
13. Freeze until hard. If saving for another day, wrap the frozen bananas in plastic wrap or foil.
